if.test: searchWords != "" and searchWords != null and searchWords.size > 0

sql.if:
AND (
tci.clnt_nm LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
)OR
tci.rpst_nm LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')

mapper.select:
SELECT clnt_id as clntIdTemp, * FROM esg.tb_client_info tci WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY tci.use_yn DESC, tci.clnt_id DESC LIMIT #{listSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC} OFFSET #{listStart, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
SELECT count(1) FROM esg.tb_client_info tci WHERE 1=1

SELECT tci.*, MAX(sf.file_id) as file_id FROM esg.tb_client_info tci LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf on sf.target_id = #{clntId} and sf.target_type='clientLogo' WHERE 1=1 AND tci.clnt_id = #{clntId} group by tci.clnt_id
mapper.insert:
select to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad( (coalesce(max(substring(clnt_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0' ) as clnt_id from esg.tb_client_info where clnt_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%';
INSERT INTO esg.tb_client_info ( clnt_id, clnt_nm, rpst_nm, rgst_no, corp_no, biz_cd, biz_nm, email, tel_no, fax_no, zip_cd, addrs1, addrs2, bank_cd, bank_no, "desc", created_at, created_by, use_yn ) VALUES ( #{clntId}, #{clntNm}, #{rpstNm}, #{rgstNo}, #{corpNo}, #{bizCd}, #{bizNm}, #{email}, #{telNo}, #{faxNo}, #{zipCd}, #{addrs1}, #{addrs2}, #{bankCd}, #{bankNo}, #{desc}, now(), #{createdBy}, 'Y' )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_client_info SET clnt_nm = #{clntNm}, rgst_no = #{rgstNo}, rpst_nm = #{rpstNm}, email = #{email}, tel_no = #{telNo}, biz_cd = #{bizCd}, biz_nm = #{bizNm}, zip_cd = #{zipCd}, addrs1 = #{addrs1}, addrs2 = #{addrs2}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE clnt_id = #{clntIdTemp}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM esg.tb_client_info tci WHERE 1=1 AND tci.clnt_id = #{clntIdTemp}
